title: nardosmia fragrans
intro: Nardosmia fragrans, also known as sweet nardosmia, is a flowering plant species in the family Campanulaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's roots and leaves are used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, and are also used to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Nardosmia fragrans can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
